header: T1 North Shore Line: Buses replace trains between Hornsby and Milsons Point. Use metro services between Victoria Cross and the City
description:
Saturday 13 and Sunday 14 June 
Buses replace trains between Hornsby and Milsons Point, also stopping at Crows Nest and Victoria Cross metro stations.
Use metro services between Chatswood, Crows Nest or Victoria Cross and the City.
T9 trains run between Berowra and Central, platforms 1-14 only.
On Sunday some late-night buses run between T1 North Shore Line stations and Wynyard.

header: Buses replace trains between Bomaderry and Wollongong
description:
Friday 12 to Sunday 14 June 
From 3:40PM Friday, buses replace trains between Bomaderry and Wollongong.
Trains run between Port Kembla, Wollongong and Central or Bondi Junction, some to a changed timetable.
Buses do not run to the train timetable. If connecting with trains at Wollongong, you may need to catch an earlier bus to ensure you meet your train connection.

header: Buses replace Inner West trains between Strathfield and Central. City Circle trackwork may affect how you travel
description:
Monday 15 and Tuesday 16 June
Nightly from 9:20PM to 1:30AM, buses replace Inner West trains between Strathfield and Central. Express trains continue to run.
Trains run to a changed timetable between Leppington and Olympic Park. Change trains at Lidcombe to continue your journey.
T1 Western Line trains make extra stops at Flemington, Homebush and Burwood. Some T9 Northern Line trains make extra stops at Croydon and Ashfield.
Trackwork on the City Circle may also affect how you travel. Change at Central for T4 trains, metro, light rail, local buses or walk. to continue your journey.

Wednesday 17 and Thursday 18 June 
Nightly from 9:40PM to 1:30AM, Inner West trains do not run. T1 Western or T9 Northern Line trains make extra stops at some stations between Parramatta and Central, to a changed timetable.
Trains run between Leppington and Olympic Park. Change trains at Lidcombe to continue your journey.
You will need to change trains if travelling to Museum, St James or Circular Quay.

Wednesday 24 and Thursday 25 June 
Nightly from 9:40PM to 1:30AM, buses replace trains between Liverpool and Lidcombe.
Trains run between Lidcombe and the City, to a changed timetable. You may need to change trains to continue your journey.
Buses also replace T2 Leppington & Inner West Line trains between Leppington and Fairfield, and T6 Lidcombe & Bankstown Line trains between Bankstown and Lidcombe.

header: Buses replace trains between Lithgow and Penrith
description:
Monday 22 to Thursday 25 June
Nightly from 8:20PM to 2:40AM, buses replace trains between Lithgow, Mount Victoria and Penrith.
Trains run between Penrith and Central, to a changed timetable. Limited trains run between Bathurst, Lithgow and Mount Victoria.
The last train from the Blue Mountains leaves Mount Victoria at 18:56, arriving Central at 21:17.
The last train to the Blue Mountains leaves Central at 19:09, arriving Lithgow at 21:59.
Tuesday to Friday, the 02:26 Mount Victoria to Central service leaves Mount Victoria at 02:40 and runs up to 14 minutes later than the normal timetable.

header: Trains do not stop at Wolli Creek but make an extra stop at Arncliffe
description:
Friday 26 June  
From 9:50PM, trains do not stop at Wolli Creek but make an extra stop at Arncliffe.
Buses run between Sydenham, Wolli Creek and Arncliffe.
Change at Arncliffe or Sydenham for a bus to Wolli Creek or change at Central for a T8 Airport & South Line train if you have luggage or accessibility needs.
Trains also make extra stops at St Peters and Erskineville.

header: At Hawkesbury River and Cowan, trains may leave from different platforms.  If travelling to Cowan you may need to change at Hawkesbury River for a bus
description:
Saturday 27 June   
From 5:30AM to 10:30AM, at Hawkesbury River and Cowan, all trains leave from platform 2.
From 7AM to 10:30AM, trains towards Hornsby do not stop at Cowan.
Buses run from Hawkesbury River to Cowan, and from Cowan to Berowra, in that direction only.
If travelling to Cowan, change at Hawkesbury River for a bus.
At Cowan, catch a bus to Berowra then change for a train to continue your journey.
Trains towards Gosford continue to stop at Cowan.

description:
Saturday 27 and Sunday 28 June
Buses replace trains between Sydenham and Central.
Trains run to the normal timetable between Macarthur, Revesby and the City via the Airport.
Trackwork on the T4 Illawarra and South Coast lines may also affect how you travel.
From Airport stations, change at:
- Central for trains towards Bondi Junction, or buses to T4 Illawarra and South Coast Line stations
- Wolli Creek for buses to stations between Redfern and Hurstville only. Change at Central if you have luggage or accessibility needs.
Metro services do not run between Sydenham and Tallawong.

header: Station Update - Macquarie Fields
description:
Station Access Changes
From Tuesday 26 August 2025 until mid-2026, the pedestrian ramp access from Railway Parade into the station on Platform 2 will be closed for upgrade works.
During this time, station access will be available via the stairs only.
Planned Trackwork buses depart from Atchinson Rd near the Service Station.
If you require ramp or lift access, please visit transportnsw.info for your accessible travel options.
For more information about the project, please contact the Project Infoline on 1800 684 490 or visit www.transport.nsw.gov.au/macquariefields.

From Tuesday 26 August 2025 until mid-2026, the pedestrian ramp access from Railway Parade into the station on Platform 2 will be closed for upgrade works.
During this time, station access will be available via the stairs only.
Planned Trackwork buses depart from Atchinson Rd near the Service Station.
If you require ramp or lift access, please visit transportnsw.info for your accessible travel options.
For more information about the project, please contact the Project Infoline on 1800 684 490 or visit www.transport.nsw.gov.au/macquariefields.

header: Station Update - Central
description:
From Monday 18 May until further notice, weekly from Sunday to Thursday, between 10pm and 5am, ceiling installation works will take place in the pedestrian tunnel between platforms 4 and 11 and the lower concourse.

 - During this time, the Redfern end stairs on Platforms 4 to 11 will be closed.
 - Customer will need to use the City end of the platform to exit via the Grand Concourse.
 - If you need assistance, ask station staff or call 9379 1777.

From Monday 18 May until further notice, weekly from Sunday to Thursday, between 10pm and 5am, ceiling installation works will take place in the pedestrian tunnel between platforms 4 and 11 and the lower concourse.

 - During this time, the Redfern end stairs on Platforms 4 to 11 will be closed.
 - Customer will need to use the City end of the platform to exit via the Grand Concourse.
 - If you need assistance, ask station staff or call 9379 1777.

header: Station Update - International Airport
description:
The lift at Sydney International Airport (between Concourse and Platform 2) will be out of service until 3 August 2026.

Customers travelling to the Airport from the City that require a lift (wheelchair customers, prams etc.) will need to travel to Wolli Creek and catch a train back to International Airport. 

Baggage handlers will be available to assist with luggage via the escalators.

From Monday 15 June until Sunday 12 July, the pedestrian ramp to access Platforms 5 and 6 (Homebush end) will be closed for upgrades. Please use the other pedestrian ramp (Burwood end) or the lift to access or exit the platform.

If you need assistance, ask station staff or call 02 9752 8430.

header: Station Update - Town Hall
description:
From Monday 15 June to Friday 24 July, one of the escalators connecting the concourse to Platform 4 will be closed for maintenance work.
Other escalators, stairs (via Platforms 1 and 2) and the lift are available to exit the platform.
 
Please allow for additional travel time to exit Platform 4.
 
If assistance is needed, ask station staff, or call 9379 4121.

From Monday 15 June to Friday 24 July, one of the escalators connecting the concourse to Platform 4 will be closed for maintenance work.
Other escalators, stairs (via Platforms 1 and 2) and the lift are available to exit the platform.
 
Please allow for additional travel time to exit Platform 4.
 
If assistance is needed, ask station staff, or call 9379 4121.

header: Parramatta CBD diversions due to Parramatta Half Marathon
description:
On Sunday 21 June, from 3AM to 11AM, route 545 buses will be diverting and using different stops while roads are closed for the Parramatta Half Marathon. 
Buses will divert around George St and Macarthur St via Wilde Ave, Smith St and Station St East in both directions to access Parramatta Bus Interchange, making stops along the detoured route. 
Stops on George St and Macarthur St will be missed in both directions. 
Visit the Parramatta Half Marathon event page for more details.

header: Town Hall House, Druitt St nightly bus stop closure
description:
Wednesday 17 June to Thursday 9 July 
Each night from 9PM to 5AM on Sundays to Thursdays, route 500N, 500X, 505, 506, 507, and 52 services will miss bus stop Town Hall House, Druitt St, Stand N due to the nightly closure of the Druitt St bus lane for expansion joint works on the Western Distributor.
Buses will divert via King St and York St.

header: Change to Rutherford Technology High School bus services and pass requirements from 26 May
description:
From Monday 26 May, students travelling in the morning from the Rutherford and Aberglasslyn areas to Rutherford Technology High School are to use the 2712 service operated by CDC NSW, instead of the S520 service operated by Grace Coaches.
Afternoon travel is now affected.

header: Route 850 is changing from 31 August
description:
From Sunday 31 August, Route 850 services will no longer operate via Gregory Hills Drive to Gregory Hills Town Centre, instead it will operate via Camden Valley Way providing customers with a more efficient trip.
Alternative bus routes operating via Gregory Hills Drive and Town Centre include:For travel to Minto, passengers can travel to Campbelltown Station via Route 840 and change to the T8 South and Airport Line.
For travel between Oran Park and Gregory Hills, passengers can use bus route 840.
For travel to Narellan passengers can use bus route 841. Timetable changes will also affect this route.
Plan your trip for real-time up to date information.

header: First Ave and Second Ave Bridge Crossing bus diversions
description:
From Friday 26 September until further notice, the following stops will be closed for route 942 services due to First Ave and Second Ave Bridge Crossing works.
 
Stops affected:
Rudd Park, First Ave (219144) and First Ave at Clarence St (219145) will be closed.
- Alternative bus stop for 942 Lugarno services: Seventh Ave at First Ave (219489)
Rudd Park, Clarence St (219147) will be closed.
- Alternative bus stop for 942 Lugarno services: Omaha St at Lincoln St (219155)
Baltimore St after Indiana Pl (219138) and Clarence St opp Rudd Park (219140) will be closed.
- Alternative bus stop for 942 Campsie services: Omaha St opp Lincoln St (219156)
Clarence St at First Ave (219142), First Ave opp Rudd Park (219473) and First Ave at Seventh Ave (219474) will be closed.
- Alternative bus stop for 942 Campsie services: Seventh Ave at First St (219491)

header: Changes to route 893 weekday service
description:
From Monday 1 December, changes to route 893 services will be as follows:
The 14:53 service from Narellan on weekdays will now depart 3 minutes earlier at 14:50. Departure times at stops throughout the journey will also change.
The 14:53 service from Narellan on weekdays will now operate via Spring Farm Dr and Norfolk Ave in Spring Farm, providing better travel options for students at Spring Farm Public School.

description:

header: New school bus services for students from Calderwood and surrounds
description:
From Monday 20 April, three new school routes will be introduced to serve the Calderwood catchment and surrounds.
New routes:
S269 – Calderwood to St Josephs HS
S270 – Calderwood to Albion Park HS
S271 – Calderwood to Shellharbour Anglican College
These routes will be operated by Premier Illawarra and will service St Joseph’s Catholic High School, Albion Park High School and Shellharbour Anglican College.
Use the Trip Planner to plan your new trip.

header: Bus changes across Greater Sydney from 21 June
description:

New Route 52 will replace Routes 500X and 500N and join the All Day Frequent Network, connecting Parramatta, Ryde and the Sydney CBD.
24 Services will operate every 10 minutes or less during the day and every 20 minutes or less in the early morning and late evening. Route 52 will also operate every 30 minutes overnight, 24 hours a day, seven days a week.

header: Lilyfield Light Rail lift is not available from 15 June
description:
The lift at Lilyfield Light Rail stop will be out of service from 15 June until further notice while replacement works are carried out. The outage is expected to continue for at least five weeks.
During this period, access to the light rail stop will be available only via stairs, if you are able to do so safely.
Customer requiring lift access should use the nearest accessible light rail stop at Leichhardt North.
To get to Leichardt North stop, from the Lilyfield stop, take the local 437 bus route from the Balmain Rd after Lilyfield Rd stop, exit at the Norton St after City West Link stop and walk to the Leichhardt North light rail stop to catch the light rail.
Please allow extra travel time and plan ahead.

header: Station Update - Central
description:
From Monday 18 May until further notice, weekly from Sunday to Thursday, between 10pm and 5am, ceiling installation works will take place in the pedestrian tunnel between platforms 4 and 11 and the lower concourse.

 - During this time, the Redfern end stairs on Platforms 4 to 11 will be closed.
 - Customer will need to use the City end of the platform to exit via the Grand Concourse.
 - If you need assistance, ask station staff or call 9379 1777.

From Monday 18 May until further notice, weekly from Sunday to Thursday, between 10pm and 5am, ceiling installation works will take place in the pedestrian tunnel between platforms 4 and 11 and the lower concourse.

 - During this time, the Redfern end stairs on Platforms 4 to 11 will be closed.
 - Customer will need to use the City end of the platform to exit via the Grand Concourse.
 - If you need assistance, ask station staff or call 9379 1777.

header: Buses replace trains between Bomaderry and Wollongong
description:
Friday 12 to Sunday 14 June 
From 3:40PM Friday, buses replace trains between Bomaderry and Wollongong.
Trains run between Port Kembla, Wollongong and Central or Bondi Junction, some to a changed timetable.
Buses do not run to the train timetable. If connecting with trains at Wollongong, you may need to catch an earlier bus to ensure you meet your train connection.

header: Buses replace some trains
description:
Monday 22 June
From 8AM to 1PM, buses replace trains between Newcastle Interchange and Telarah or Muswellbrook.
The 08:29 Newcastle Interchange to Dungog will not run. Catch the 08:48 Newcastle Interchange to Telarah train and change at Maitland for a bus towards Dungog.
Buses also replace the 10:02 Dungog to Newcastle Interchange service.

header: Buses replace trains between Lithgow and Penrith
description:
Monday 22 to Thursday 25 June
Nightly from 8:20PM to 2:40AM, buses replace trains between Lithgow, Mount Victoria and Penrith.
Trains run between Penrith and Central, to a changed timetable. Limited trains run between Bathurst, Lithgow and Mount Victoria.
The last train from the Blue Mountains leaves Mount Victoria at 18:56, arriving Central at 21:17.
The last train to the Blue Mountains leaves Central at 19:09, arriving Lithgow at 21:59.
Tuesday to Friday, the 02:26 Mount Victoria to Central service leaves Mount Victoria at 02:40 and runs up to 14 minutes later than the normal timetable.

header: 21st April 2026 to 02 July 2026 inclusive- Benalla Station access.
description: Due to Station upgrade work being undertaken at Benalla, the XPT service will not stop at Benalla. Passengers travelling to Benalla will alight the XPT at Wangaratta to connect with a road coach to Benalla. Passengers travelling from Benalla will be conveyed by road coach to Wangaratta to connect with the XPT for the remainder of the journey.

header: Station Update - Central
description:
From Monday 18 May until further notice, weekly from Sunday to Thursday, between 10pm and 5am, ceiling installation works will take place in the pedestrian tunnel between platforms 4 and 11 and the lower concourse.

 - During this time, the Redfern end stairs on Platforms 4 to 11 will be closed.
 - Customer will need to use the City end of the platform to exit via the Grand Concourse.
 - If you need assistance, ask station staff or call 9379 1777.

From Monday 18 May until further notice, weekly from Sunday to Thursday, between 10pm and 5am, ceiling installation works will take place in the pedestrian tunnel between platforms 4 and 11 and the lower concourse.

 - During this time, the Redfern end stairs on Platforms 4 to 11 will be closed.
 - Customer will need to use the City end of the platform to exit via the Grand Concourse.
 - If you need assistance, ask station staff or call 9379 1777.
